steps.title: Express the 6% increase algebraically
steps.content:
Increasing x by 6% means we add 6% of x to the original value.

Convert 6% to decimal: $$6\% = 0.06$$
So the increased value is: $$x + 0.06x$$

steps.title: Factor and simplify
steps.content:
Factor out x from both terms:
$$x + 0.06x = x(1 + 0.06) = 1.06x$$
That confirms A is correct.
